title: ArigConfig
description: Top-level arig config. Lives at `arig.yaml` by default.

dirs.description: Directories arig writes to. Defaults under `.arig/var/`.

services.description: Services to supervise, keyed by service name.

logs.description: Base directory for per-session log folders.

tcp.description: TCP host:port to connect to. Probe passes when connect() succeeds.

timeout.description: Total time to keep retrying before giving up. e.g. "30s", "1m 30s".

command.description: Command line to execute. Run via the system shell.

depends_on.description: Other service names that must be ready before this one starts.

env.description: Extra environment variables to set for the process.

ready.description: Optional readiness probe. Dependents wait until this passes.

timeout.description:
Maximum time a oneshot may run before it's killed and the wave fails.
Ignored for long-running services. e.g. "5m", "30s". No default: opt-in.

working_dir.description: Working directory for the command. Relative to the config file's directory.

ServiceType.description: How arig should treat a service for shutdown and exit semantics.

oneOf.description: Long-running process; arig keeps it alive and stops it on shutdown.
Runs to completion once; arig waits for exit before dependents start.
